Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0B09 "BATTLEOFTHEPLANETS-8000-0B09" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $8000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Battle of the Planets.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $8000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Note - to default to joystick control, the following changes were made:
1. Changed $0D3B from $00 to $01 2. Changed $0DC6 from $10 to $C0 3. Changed $0DDC from $C0 to $10
